mapper.select: select ftc.preview_masking_enabled, ftc.error_line_masking_enabled, ftc.log_masking_enabled, ftc.content_encryption_enabled, ftc.encryption_key_ref, ftc.download_requires_approval, ftc.masking_rule_set from batch.file_record fr left join lateral ( select t.preview_masking_enabled, t.error_line_masking_enabled, t.log_masking_enabled, t.content_encryption_enabled, t.encryption_key_ref, t.download_requires_approval, t.masking_rule_set from batch.file_template_config t where t.tenant_id = fr.tenant_id and fr.metadata_json ->> 'templateCode' is not null and fr.metadata_json ->> 'templateCode' <> '' and t.template_code = fr.metadata_json ->> 'templateCode' and t.enabled = true order by t.version desc limit 1 ) ftc on true where fr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and fr.id = #{fileId}
mapper.update: update batch.file_dispatch_record set dispatch_status = #{dispatchCreatedStatus}, receipt_status = 'NONE', error_code = null, error_message = null, ack_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{dispatchRecordId}
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, file_name, file_status, created_at, updated_at, metadata_json ->> 'fileGroupCode' as file_group_code, metadata_json ->> 'waitFileGroupMode' as wait_file_group_mode, metadata_json ->> 'requiredFileSet' as required_file_set, metadata_json ->> 'arrivalTimeoutAction' as arrival_timeout_action, metadata_json ->> 'arrivalState' as arrival_state, metadata_json ->> 'arrivalReason' as arrival_reason, metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime' as expected_arrival_time, metadata_json ->> 'latestTolerableTime' as latest_tolerable_time, metadata_json ->> 'triggerOnComplete' as trigger_on_complete from batch.file_record where jsonb_exists(metadata_json, 'fileGroupCode') and coalesce(metadata_json ->> 'arrivalState', 'WAITING_ARRIVAL') not in ('TRIGGERED', 'TIMEOUT') order by coalesce((metadata_json ->> 'latestTolerableTime')::timestamptz, created_at) asc, created_at asc limit #{limit}

select id, tenant_id, file_name, file_status, metadata_json, metadata_json ->> 'fileGroupCode' as file_group_code, coalesce(metadata_json ->> 'arrivalState', 'WAITING_ARRIVAL') as arrival_state, coalesce(metadata_json ->> 'arrivalTimeoutAction', 'MANUAL_CONFIRM') as arrival_timeout_action, coalesce(metadata_json ->> 'allowEmptyRun', 'false') as allow_empty_run, coalesce(metadata_json ->> 'allowSkipBizDate', 'false') as allow_skip_biz_date, metadata_json ->> 'requiredFileSet' as required_file_set, metadata_json ->> 'latestTolerableTime' as latest_tolerable_time from batch.file_record where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and metadata_json ->> 'fileGroupCode' = #{fileGroupCode} order by id asc

select count(1) from batch.file_record where jsonb_exists(metadata_json, 'expectedArrivalTime') and created_at > ((metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime')::timestamptz + (#{thresholdSeconds} * interval '1 second'))

select coalesce(max(extract(epoch from (created_at - ((metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime')::timestamptz)))), 0)::bigint from batch.file_record where jsonb_exists(metadata_json, 'expectedArrivalTime')

select tenant_id, id, file_name, created_at, (metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime') as expected_arrival_time, extract(epoch from (created_at - ((metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime')::timestamptz)))::bigint as arrival_delay_seconds from batch.file_record where jsonb_exists(metadata_json, 'expectedArrivalTime') and created_at > ((metadata_json ->> 'expectedArrivalTime')::timestamptz + (#{thresholdSeconds} * interval '1 second')) order by arrival_delay_seconds desc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from batch.pipeline_instance where run_status = #{runningStatus} and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (#{thresholdSeconds} * interval '1 second')
select coalesce(max(extract(epoch from (current_timestamp - started_at))), 0)::bigint from batch.pipeline_instance where run_status = #{runningStatus} and started_at is not null

select tenant_id, id, pipeline_code, pipeline_type, related_job_instance_id, started_at, extract(epoch from (current_timestamp - started_at))::bigint as processing_delay_seconds from batch.pipeline_instance where run_status = #{runningStatus} and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (#{thresholdSeconds} * interval '1 second') order by processing_delay_seconds desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_record ( tenant_id, file_category, file_name, original_file_name, file_ext, file_format_type, charset, mime_type, file_size_bytes, checksum_type, checksum_value, storage_type, storage_path, storage_bucket, file_version, file_generation_no, is_latest, source_type, source_ref, file_status, biz_date, trace_id, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{fileCategory}, #{fileName}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{fileFormatType}, 'UTF-8', #{mimeType}, #{fileSizeBytes}, 'NONE', null, #{storageType}, #{storagePath}, #{storageBucket}, 'v1', 1, true, #{sourceType}, null, #{fileStatus}, null, #{traceId}, #{metadataJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )

insert into batch.file_audit_log ( tenant_id, file_id, operation_type, operation_result, operator_type, operator_id, trace_id, detail_summary, created_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{fileId}, #{operationType}, #{operationResult}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{traceId}, #{detailSummaryJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, current_timestamp )
